channel.title: Git Going with GitHub - Audio Series
channel.description: Companion audio episodes for the Git Going with GitHub workshop. Conversational overviews of every chapter and appendix, designed for blind and low-vision developers learning GitHub and open source collaboration.
channel.itunes:author: Community Access
channel.itunes:summary: 44 companion audio episodes for the Git Going with GitHub workshop - a two-day course teaching blind and low-vision developers to collaborate on GitHub using screen readers, VS Code, and accessibility agents.

item.title: Episode 0: Welcome to Git Going with GitHub
item.description: A tour of the workshop structure, the two-day arc, and what you will accomplish.
item.itunes:title: Welcome to Git Going with GitHub
item.itunes:summary: A tour of the workshop structure, the two-day arc, and what you will accomplish.

item.title: Episode 1: Pre-Workshop Setup
item.description: Creating your GitHub account, installing Git and VS Code, configuring your screen reader.
item.itunes:title: Pre-Workshop Setup
item.itunes:summary: Creating your GitHub account, installing Git and VS Code, configuring your screen reader.

item.title: Episode 2: Understanding GitHub on the Web
item.description: How GitHub organizes its web pages, heading structure, landmarks, and keyboard shortcuts.
item.itunes:title: Understanding GitHub on the Web
item.itunes:summary: How GitHub organizes its web pages, heading structure, landmarks, and keyboard shortcuts.

item.title: Episode 3: Navigating Repositories
item.description: Exploring a repository: tabs, files, README, branches, and commit history.
item.itunes:title: Navigating Repositories
item.itunes:summary: Exploring a repository: tabs, files, README, branches, and commit history.

item.title: Episode 4: The Learning Room
item.description: Your shared practice environment: challenges, PR workflow, bot feedback, peer review.
item.itunes:title: The Learning Room
item.itunes:summary: Your shared practice environment: challenges, PR workflow, bot feedback, peer review.

item.title: Episode 5: Working with Issues
item.description: Filing, searching, filtering, commenting on, and managing GitHub issues.
item.itunes:title: Working with Issues
item.itunes:summary: Filing, searching, filtering, commenting on, and managing GitHub issues.

item.title: Episode 6: Working with Pull Requests
item.description: Creating, reviewing, commenting on, and merging pull requests.
item.itunes:title: Working with Pull Requests
item.itunes:summary: Creating, reviewing, commenting on, and merging pull requests.

item.title: Episode 7: Merge Conflicts Are Not Scary
item.description: Why conflicts happen, how to read conflict markers, and resolving them confidently.
item.itunes:title: Merge Conflicts Are Not Scary
item.itunes:summary: Why conflicts happen, how to read conflict markers, and resolving them confidently.

item.title: Episode 8: Open Source Culture and Etiquette
item.description: Communication norms, code review etiquette, inclusive language, and asking questions.
item.itunes:title: Open Source Culture and Etiquette
item.itunes:summary: Communication norms, code review etiquette, inclusive language, and asking questions.

item.title: Episode 9: Labels, Milestones, and Projects
item.description: Organizing and tracking work with labels, milestones, and GitHub Projects.
item.itunes:title: Labels, Milestones, and Projects
item.itunes:summary: Organizing and tracking work with labels, milestones, and GitHub Projects.

item.title: Episode 10: Notifications and Mentions
item.description: Managing your notification inbox, @mentions, and strategies for avoiding overload.
item.itunes:title: Notifications and Mentions
item.itunes:summary: Managing your notification inbox, @mentions, and strategies for avoiding overload.

item.title: Episode 11: VS Code Setup and Accessibility
item.description: Screen reader mode, Command Palette, sidebar navigation, and accessibility settings.
item.itunes:title: VS Code Setup and Accessibility
item.itunes:summary: Screen reader mode, Command Palette, sidebar navigation, and accessibility settings.

item.title: Episode 12: Git and Source Control in VS Code
item.description: Cloning, branching, staging, committing, pushing, and pulling from VS Code.
item.itunes:title: Git and Source Control in VS Code
item.itunes:summary: Cloning, branching, staging, committing, pushing, and pulling from VS Code.

item.title: Episode 13: The GitHub Pull Requests Extension
item.description: Viewing, creating, reviewing, and merging PRs from inside VS Code.
item.itunes:title: The GitHub Pull Requests Extension
item.itunes:summary: Viewing, creating, reviewing, and merging PRs from inside VS Code.

item.title: Episode 14: GitHub Copilot
item.description: Inline suggestions, Copilot Chat, prompting strategies, and custom instructions.
item.itunes:title: GitHub Copilot
item.itunes:summary: Inline suggestions, Copilot Chat, prompting strategies, and custom instructions.

item.title: Episode 15: Accessible Code Review
item.description: Navigating diffs with a screen reader, reviewing PRs in browser and VS Code.
item.itunes:title: Accessible Code Review
item.itunes:summary: Navigating diffs with a screen reader, reviewing PRs in browser and VS Code.

item.title: Episode 16: Issue Templates
item.description: Creating YAML-based issue templates for bug reports, features, and custom forms.
item.itunes:title: Issue Templates
item.itunes:summary: Creating YAML-based issue templates for bug reports, features, and custom forms.

item.title: Episode 17: Accessibility Agents
item.description: Six agents, 28 slash commands, custom agents, and agentic accessibility workflows.
item.itunes:title: Accessibility Agents
item.itunes:summary: Six agents, 28 slash commands, custom agents, and agentic accessibility workflows.

item.title: Episode 18: Glossary of Terms
item.description: Comprehensive glossary: Git, GitHub, open source, and accessibility terminology.
item.itunes:title: Glossary of Terms
item.itunes:summary: Comprehensive glossary: Git, GitHub, open source, and accessibility terminology.

item.title: Episode 19: Screen Reader Cheat Sheet
item.description: NVDA, JAWS, and VoiceOver commands for GitHub and VS Code.
item.itunes:title: Screen Reader Cheat Sheet
item.itunes:summary: NVDA, JAWS, and VoiceOver commands for GitHub and VS Code.

item.title: Episode 20: Accessibility Standards Reference
item.description: WCAG 2.2, ARIA roles, and the PR accessibility checklist.
item.itunes:title: Accessibility Standards Reference
item.itunes:summary: WCAG 2.2, ARIA roles, and the PR accessibility checklist.

item.title: Episode 21: Git Authentication
item.description: Personal access tokens, SSH keys, credential storage, and commit signing.
item.itunes:title: Git Authentication
item.itunes:summary: Personal access tokens, SSH keys, credential storage, and commit signing.

item.title: Episode 22: GitHub Flavored Markdown
item.description: Markdown syntax, GitHub extensions, and writing accessible documentation.
item.itunes:title: GitHub Flavored Markdown
item.itunes:summary: Markdown syntax, GitHub extensions, and writing accessible documentation.

item.title: Episode 23: GitHub Gists
item.description: Lightweight code sharing: creating, editing, forking, and embedding Gists.
item.itunes:title: GitHub Gists
item.itunes:summary: Lightweight code sharing: creating, editing, forking, and embedding Gists.

item.title: Episode 24: GitHub Discussions
item.description: Forum-style conversations, Q&A, polls, and navigation with screen readers.
item.itunes:title: GitHub Discussions
item.itunes:summary: Forum-style conversations, Q&A, polls, and navigation with screen readers.

item.title: Episode 25: Releases, Tags, and Insights
item.description: Semantic versioning, GitHub Releases, and repository analytics.
item.itunes:title: Releases, Tags, and Insights
item.itunes:summary: Semantic versioning, GitHub Releases, and repository analytics.

item.title: Episode 26: GitHub Projects Deep Dive
item.description: Project boards, table and roadmap views, custom fields, cross-repo management.
item.itunes:title: GitHub Projects Deep Dive
item.itunes:summary: Project boards, table and roadmap views, custom fields, cross-repo management.

item.title: Episode 27: Advanced Search
item.description: GitHub search query language, qualifiers, and filtering for issues, PRs, and code.
item.itunes:title: Advanced Search
item.itunes:summary: GitHub search query language, qualifiers, and filtering for issues, PRs, and code.

item.title: Episode 28: Branch Protection and Rulesets
item.description: Required reviews, status checks, rulesets, and diagnosing blocked merges.
item.itunes:title: Branch Protection and Rulesets
item.itunes:summary: Required reviews, status checks, rulesets, and diagnosing blocked merges.

item.title: Episode 29: GitHub Security Features
item.description: Dependabot, secret scanning, code scanning, and private security advisories.
item.itunes:title: GitHub Security Features
item.itunes:summary: Dependabot, secret scanning, code scanning, and private security advisories.

item.title: Episode 30: VS Code Accessibility Reference
item.description: Complete accessibility settings, audio signals, diff viewer, and screen reader configs.
item.itunes:title: VS Code Accessibility Reference
item.itunes:summary: Complete accessibility settings, audio signals, diff viewer, and screen reader configs.

item.title: Episode 31: GitHub Codespaces
item.description: Cloud dev environments, accessibility setup, and screen reader usage.
item.itunes:title: GitHub Codespaces
item.itunes:summary: Cloud dev environments, accessibility setup, and screen reader usage.

item.title: Episode 32: GitHub Mobile
item.description: VoiceOver and TalkBack guide for iOS and Android GitHub apps.
item.itunes:title: GitHub Mobile
item.itunes:summary: VoiceOver and TalkBack guide for iOS and Android GitHub apps.

item.title: Episode 33: Publishing with GitHub Pages
item.description: Free static site hosting, custom domains, HTTPS, and accessibility.
item.itunes:title: Publishing with GitHub Pages
item.itunes:summary: Free static site hosting, custom domains, HTTPS, and accessibility.

item.title: Episode 34: GitHub Actions and Workflows
item.description: Workflow YAML structure, CI/CD, automation, and the Actions marketplace.
item.itunes:title: GitHub Actions and Workflows
item.itunes:summary: Workflow YAML structure, CI/CD, automation, and the Actions marketplace.

item.title: Episode 35: Profile, Sponsors, and Wikis
item.description: Profile README, GitHub Sponsors, and repository Wikis.
item.itunes:title: Profile, Sponsors, and Wikis
item.itunes:summary: Profile README, GitHub Sponsors, and repository Wikis.

item.title: Episode 36: Organizations and Templates
item.description: GitHub Organizations, repository templates, visibility, and archiving.
item.itunes:title: Organizations and Templates
item.itunes:summary: GitHub Organizations, repository templates, visibility, and archiving.

item.title: Episode 37: Contributing to Open Source
item.description: Finding issues, scoping contributions, the fork-to-PR workflow, and building habits.
item.itunes:title: Contributing to Open Source
item.itunes:summary: Finding issues, scoping contributions, the fork-to-PR workflow, and building habits.

item.title: Episode 38: Resources and Links
item.description: Tools, references, communities, and continued learning paths.
item.itunes:title: Resources and Links
item.itunes:summary: Tools, references, communities, and continued learning paths.

item.title: Episode 39: Accessibility Agents - Complete Reference
item.description: All six agents, all 28 slash commands, customization, and troubleshooting.
item.itunes:title: Accessibility Agents - Complete Reference
item.itunes:summary: All six agents, all 28 slash commands, customization, and troubleshooting.

item.title: Episode 40: GitHub Copilot - Complete Reference
item.description: All Copilot features, chat participants, slash commands, and MCP servers.
item.itunes:title: GitHub Copilot - Complete Reference
item.itunes:summary: All Copilot features, chat participants, slash commands, and MCP servers.

item.title: Episode 41: Copilot AI Models
item.description: Model comparison, strengths, plan availability, and selection guidance.
item.itunes:title: Copilot AI Models
item.itunes:summary: Model comparison, strengths, plan availability, and selection guidance.

item.title: Episode 42: Accessing Workshop Materials
item.description: Downloading the repository, reading offline, keeping updated, audio format.
item.itunes:title: Accessing Workshop Materials
item.itunes:summary: Downloading the repository, reading offline, keeping updated, audio format.

item.title: Episode 43: GitHub Skills - Complete Course Catalog
item.description: All 36 GitHub Skills modules organized into six learning paths.
item.itunes:title: GitHub Skills - Complete Course Catalog
item.itunes:summary: All 36 GitHub Skills modules organized into six learning paths.
